feature.name: TOML document parse and round-trip editing
feature.description: Extract tomlkit's core TOML parsing, document editing, and formatting-preserving dump API as a standalone package.
included_behaviors: parse TOML strings and bytes into mutable TOMLDocument objects
preserve comments, blank lines, table order, inline tables, literal strings, multiline strings, and array formatting when dumping parsed documents
dump plain mappings, nested mappings, arrays, inline tables, and arrays of tables
support sorted-key dumping for mappings and parsed documents
support datetime, date, time, integers, floats, booleans, arrays, tables, dotted keys, and unicode strings
raise stable ParseError subclasses with line and column information for malformed TOML
excluded_behaviors: packaging metadata from the original project

entanglement.description: Round-trip TOML behavior depends on parser state, document item models, formatting preservation, and error metadata.

output.import: from featurelifted import parse, loads, dumps, document, table, inline_table, array, aot, string, item; from featurelifted.exceptions import ParseError, UnexpectedCharError, InvalidUnicodeValueError
